explicit_next_phase_requirement: P1 plan-lock authoring + sealing + commit completes here. The NEXT phase is P2 phase-2 plan (S10-D2 chain precedent: Tier-N -> P1 -> P2 -> P3 BUILD). P2 phase-2 plan REQUIRES SEPARATE OPERATOR AUTHORIZATION via: 'AUTHORIZE S11-D1 P2 phase-2 plan only'. The P2 phase-2 plan shall adapt the docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.md C1-C8 byte-equivalent for S11-D1 with single-instrument adaptations where the template requires per-market parameters. NO PHASE BEYOND P2 IS PRE-APPROVED by this P1 plan-lock. Each subsequent phase (P3 BUILD, P4 smoke, P6 IS, P6.5 cost-stress, P7 decision memo, P10 OOS gate, P11 lifecycle decision) requires its own separate operator authorization.
files_explicitly_forbidden_during_all_s1: Any S10-D2 sealed artifact (commit 23c7164 PARK and the full S10-D2 chain).

Any S10-D2 source file (in_sample_driver.py, out_of_sample_driver.py, main.py, execution_guard.py, test_smoke_t1_t15.py, test_oos_driver_invariants.py, conftest.py, synthetic CSV fixtures, __init__.py).
Any S10-D2 cache directory (data/databento_cache/, data/databento_cache_oos/, data/databento_cache_is_only/).
Any s10-D1 MNQ+MGC artifact OTHER than the sealed MNQ.c.0 CSV at the path specified in section 3 (which is reused READ-ONLY byte-equivalent).
Any s9 RSI-2, s7 D1 ETF-proxy, s8-D1, B005_NNN, B006_001, B006_002, T8, NKE artifact.
All ORB branch artifacts and Step 30 cost constants.
brain_memory/projects/trading_bot/lessons.md (long-running parallel-session dirty file; explicitly off-limits in EVERY S11-D1 phase unless a separate authorization names it as the target).
app.py, templates/base.html, or any web/UI file modified by the parallel session.
The sealed Tier-N spec files (docs/s11_d1_..._tier_n_spec.md and reports/..._tier_n_spec_sealed.json) — these are LOCKED at the Tier-N seal and cannot be modified.
This P1 plan-lock document itself once committed — any change to the plan-lock requires a fresh _revN_ plan-lock under separate authorization.
Any file outside the S11-D1 candidate_record_id namespace.

git_staging_commit_protocol_locked.commit_pattern_forbidden: git commit -a / git commit --no-verify / git commit --amend
post_commit_verification_required: Verify: every committed path matches an authorized path
Verify: no unrelated files in the commit
Report: any tracked dirty files (parallel-session noise; should not be mine)
post_stage_verification_required: Verify: staged count == authorized count for this phase
Verify: every staged path matches an authorized path regex
pre_stage_check_required: Halt if any parallel-session file is staged
Halt if any S10-D2 reconciliation file is staged
Halt if app.py / templates/base.html / lessons.md are staged
Halt if any unrelated tracked file is in the index
git_staging_commit_protocol_locked.staging_pattern_forbidden: git add . / git add -A / git add * / git add <directory>

input_data.primary_access: READ-ONLY; byte-equivalent reuse from s10-D1 sealed fetch
input_data.primary_format: CSV (per s10-D1 fetch tool output schema; daily bars with ts_event index)

k9_sample_size_rules.expected_is_trade_count_estimate: DAILY DONCHIAN-55/20 ON SINGLE INSTRUMENT OVER 4.6 YEARS IS HISTORICALLY SPARSE. Reference: S10-D2 NQ leg produced 54 trades over 10 years (~5.4/year). Scaled to 4.6y single-instrument expected: 25-50 trades. THIS IS BELOW K9=100 THRESHOLD.
k9_sample_size_rules.if_k9_fires_at_is: Verdict at IS shall be INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE (NOT FAIL_SAFETY). Chain shall NOT relax K9. Appropriate response is to seal the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE verdict and the operator shall decide between (a) continuing to P10 OOS despite IS being undersampled, (b) parking S11-D1 with PARK memo at IS stage, or (c) selecting a different mechanic family in a fresh candidate.
k9_sample_size_rules.if_k9_fires_at_oos: Verdict at OOS shall be INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE. Chain shall NOT relax K9. Appropriate response is to park S11-D1 with PARK memo (analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED).
k9_sample_size_rules.k9_risk_at_is_phase: STRUCTURALLY POSSIBLE — INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE verdict expected if observed
k9_sample_size_rules.k9_risk_at_oos_phase: STRUCTURALLY EXPECTED — 2y OOS window will produce far fewer trades than IS

p3_build_allowed_files.creation_pattern: P3 BUILD shall be split into 3 sub-phases (sequential, each separately authorized): P3-RUNNER (source files 1-3 + runner sealed build report), P3-IS-DRIVER (in_sample_driver.py + IS driver build report), and P3-OOS-DRIVER (out_of_sample_driver.py + OOS driver build report). OR P3 may be a single combined authorization if the operator prefers; the P1 plan-lock does not pre-impose a sub-split. Each invocation must list exactly its target files.
p3_build_allowed_files.test_scaffold_inclusion_in_p3_build: Test scaffold files (tests/__init__.py, conftest.py, synthetic_mnq_daily.csv, test_smoke_t1_t15.py, test_oos_driver_invariants.py) MAY be included in P3 BUILD directly, OR may be deferred to a P3.5 BUILD-EXTENSION (lesson from S10-D2 chain where conftest + fixtures were omitted from P3 and required a P3.5 retrofit). The S11-D1 P1 plan-lock RECOMMENDS including test scaffold in the original P3 BUILD authorization to avoid the retrofit pattern.

a_gates_evaluated_at_p6_is.A4_trade_curve_maxdd_pct_le_30: fail -> FAIL_SAFETY (S10-D2 used 50; S11-D1 tightens to 30 per Tier-N spec rejection-rules section, single-instrument higher concentration risk)
a_gates_evaluated_at_p6_is.A5: NOT APPLICABLE (single instrument; no portfolio_wr_gap diversification claim possible)

strategy_mechanic_boundaries_locked.roll_method: Continuous front-month per Databento stype_in=continuous; no operator-side roll override
